title: Chugach Education Services, Inc Partners with DoD in Outreach to Afghan Refugees
summary: Earlier this month, Chugach Education Services, Inc. (CESI), participated in an outreach effort for Afghan refugees hosted by the Department of Defense at Fort McCoy, Wisconsin. Our representatives, Bobby Irvin, CESI Program Manager, and Bill Otter, Center Director for our Paul Simon Job Corps Cente...

title: BSNC Promotes Jamie (Klushkan) Yingling to Payroll Specialist I
summary: BSNC would like to congratulate descendant Jamie (Klushkan) Yingling on her recent promotion to Payroll Specialist I. In her new role, Jamie enters and reviews employee timesheets and is responsible for the full payroll process, including compiling, copying and ensuring reports are filed accurately...
